content_of_post_to_comment: I am still codependent. I still have to remind myself to stop focussing on the other and focus on what is good for me. I still have to stop myself from sending messages to me ex boyfriend to teach him a lesson or make him feel something. None of this serves me but I have to be patient with myself. Us codependents can be so annoying, so up in everyone else’s business, etc etc. We think we know what is best for others while we really need to figure out what is good for us instead.
